message:
feat(config,conformance): add hardened deviation allowlist and bitmask file-presence checks

Introduce HardenedDeviationCategory enum in fr-config with an explicit
allowlist for hardened mode, gating bounded deviations (parser diagnostics,
replay repair, resource clamping, metadata sanitization) behind
RuntimePolicy::is_deviation_allowed(). Default strict policy has an empty
allowlist; RuntimePolicy::hardened() populates the full default set.

Refactor phase2c_schema validation in fr-conformance to use a single
read_dir pass with bitmask file-presence tracking instead of per-file
Path::is_file() calls. Also switch parse_json_file from read_to_string +
from_str to read + from_slice to avoid redundant UTF-8 validation. Add
test asserting all required packet files have mapped presence bits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
